originalTitle: Apple’s latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
summary: If you’re looking for a laptop that’ll still perform well several years from now, Apple’s latest MacBook Air is hard to beat. Now, in particular, is a good time to pick one up, as you can currently buy the 13-inch MacBook Air at Amazon in the run-up to Memorial Day with an M5 chip, 16GB […]
content: If you’re looking for a laptop that’ll still perform well several years from now, Apple’s latest MacBook Air is hard to beat. Now, in particular, is a good time to pick one up, as you can currently buy the 13-inch MacBook Air at Amazon in the run-up to Memorial Day with an M5 chip, 16GB of RAM, and a 512GB SSD for $899.99 ($200 off), which is a new low price. The 15-inch model, meanwhile, is also on sale at Amazon for $1,099.99 ($200 off) in select colors, or at Best Buy for $1,149. [Product: Apple 13-inch MacBook Air (M5) | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-2026-MacBook-13-inch-Laptop/dp/B0GR1493ZV/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2F13-inch-macbook-air-apple-m5-chip-with-10-core-cpu-and-8-core-gpu-16gb-memory-512gb-ssd-midnight%2FJJGCQLKXL7] [Product: Apple MacBook Air 15 (M5) | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-2026-MacBook-15-inch-Laptop/dp/B0GR1N82GJ/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2F15-inch-macbook-air-apple-m5-chip-with-10-core-cpu-and-10-core-gpu-16gb-memory-512gb-ssd-midnight%2FJJGCQLKQL9%2Fsku%2F6571043] Unless you need a laptop for intensive gaming or demanding workloads like 3D modeling, the M5 Air is the laptop we recommend to most people. Apple’s latest model is faster and better at handling everyday workloads than the new MacBook Neo, whether that means juggling dozens of tabs or tackling some light video editing. The 2026 iteration is an even better value than before, as it boasts double the base storage, allowing for more apps and files. Storage performance is also impressive, with read and write speeds that rival the M5 MacBook Pro, so transferring files and multitasking feel much faster. Apple’s mid-tier laptop excels in other ways, too. Its sharp, vibrant display makes everything from spreadsheets to Netflix shine, and it’s both slim and light enough that it’s easy to tote around in a backpack. It also lasts around 13 hours on a single charge — more than enough for a full day of use — while its 12-megapixel Center Stage webcam offers best-in-class performance. Sure, none of it is a huge step up from prior models, but given how good the MacBook Air has become in recent years, sometimes a few subtle refinements are all you need. Read our full 2026 MacBook Air review.
chineseTitle: 苹果最新款 MacBook Air 两种尺寸均在阵亡将士纪念日降价 200 美元
chineseSummary: 如果您正在寻找一款几年后仍能表现出色的笔记本电脑，Apple 最新的 MacBook Air 是您的最佳选择。现在，尤其是购买一台的好时机，因为您目前可以在阵亡将士纪念日之前在亚马逊购买配备 M5 芯片、16GB 的 13 英寸 MacBook Air [...]
chineseContent: 如果您正在寻找一款几年后仍能表现出色的笔记本电脑，Apple 最新的 MacBook Air 是您的最佳选择。现在尤其是购买一台的好时机，因为您目前可以在阵亡将士纪念日之前在亚马逊购买配备 M5 芯片、16GB RAM 和 512GB SSD 的 13 英寸 MacBook Air，价格为 899.99 美元（折扣 200 美元），这是一个新的低价。与此同时，这款 15 英寸型号在 Amazon 上的部分颜色售价为 1,099.99 美元（折扣 200 美元），在 Best Buy 的售价为 1,149 美元。 [产品：苹果 13 英寸 MacBook Air (M5) | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-2026-MacBook-13-inch-Laptop/dp/B0GR1493ZV/?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2F13-inch-m acbook-air-apple-m5-chip-with-10-core-cpu-and-8-core-gpu-16gb-memory-512gb-ssd-midnight%2FJJGCQLKXL7] [产品：苹果 MacBook Air 15 (M5) | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-2026-MacBook-15-inch-Laptop/dp/B0GR1N82GJ/?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2F15-inch-macbook-ai r-apple-m5-chip-with-10-core-cpu-and-10-core-gpu-16gb-memory-512gb-ssd-midnight%2FJJGCQLKQL9%2Fsku%2F6571043]除非您需要笔记本电脑来进行密集型游戏或 3D 建模等要求较高的工作负载，否则 M5 Air 是我们向大多数人推荐的笔记本电脑。苹果的最新型号在处理日常工作负载方面比新款 MacBook Neo 更快、更好，无论这意味着处理数十个选项卡还是处理一些轻微的视频编辑。 2026 年迭代比以前更有价值，因为它拥有双倍的基本存储空间，可容纳更多应用程序和文件。存储性能也令人印象深刻，读写速度可与 M5 MacBook Pro 相媲美，因此传输文件和多任务处理感觉更快。苹果的中端笔记本电脑
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
